pages.text: Combat stealth class. Crafts two shadow armor sets (Rogue, with phantom-membrane and sculk-vein dye; and Assassin, with sculk-darkened hood and netherite-scrap), the Grave-Sentinel armor set, the Cursed Blade and Crimson Reaper paired weapons, and the Rogue spell book.$(br2)Phantom membrane is the signature material for the shadow sets.
